title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama project: a lightweight, extensible framework for running large language models locally with a simple API and model library.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: Popular orchestration library with first-class Ollama integration for chaining local LLM calls, retrieval, agents and tools.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; install via pip and chat with any model in two lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-model chats, file uploads and RAG.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight React-based web GUI for chatting with Ollama models; no backend except Ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI wrapper around ollama with history, syntax highlighting and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot for inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server plus optional web UIs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs entirely offline.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model; supports threads and slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query local models directly from Slack.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official Ollama JavaScript client on npm with 100k+ weekly downloads and full TypeScript support.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official Python client on PyPI with 200k+ weekly downloads; async/await, streaming, embeddings in one package.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-built Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Idiomatic Go client library (SDK) for Ollama with context cancellation and streaming support.
